This native will be an educated one, but of harsh nature, Jupiter
and Dragon Tail are 5th from Mercury, indicating food education
of the native.
Regarding harsh nature :
MOON+MARS+DRAGON HEAD-These3 planets are in the
North sign. Dragon Head and Mars (Dragon Head is Tama and
Mars/is egoism.) Moon is debilitated. Therefore the native has
quick/angry/aggresive temperament.
